roman: Panchamam Skanda mateti shashtham Katyayani ti cha

english: Ninth Siddhidatri — these nine Durgas are proclaimed
roman: Navamam Siddhidatri cha Nava Durga prakirtitah

english: These names were spoken by Brahma himself, the great soul

hindi: नवरात्रि में पूजित नौ रूपा, भक्तन की हर्ता भव पीड़ा।
english: Nine forms worshipped in Navratri, removing devotees from worldly pain
roman: Navratri mein poojit nau rupa bhaktan ki harta bhav peeda

hindi: जय जय नवदुर्गे माता, सब संकट की हर्ता।
english: Victory to the nine Durgas, remover of all troubles
roman: Jaya jaya Navadurge mata sab sankat ki harta

english: Whoever reads this Navadurga Stotram daily with devotion
roman: Navadurga stotram yah pathet nityam bhaktiman

english: By the grace of Navratri he attains all desires
